/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/maths_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/maths_unittest.dir/maths_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/maths_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/maths.c.o CMakeFiles/maths_unittest.dir/maths_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o maths_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
